summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 4 features: Async generate-and-publish with job polling, Activity Log system (backend + frontend), Generator page with 3-column layout, Article preview modal with SEO metadata. All 12 backend tests passed, all frontend UI tests passed.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login (admin@seoengine.it / admin123) - working
Backend: GET /api/activity-logs returns 18 log entries
Backend: GET /api/activity-logs?limit=10 respects limit parameter
Backend: GET /api/activity-logs/{client_id} returns filtered logs (18 for test client)
Backend: Activity log structure valid (id, client_id, action, status, timestamp)
Backend: GET /api/jobs/{job_id} returns completed job status with summary
Backend: GET /api/jobs/{non-existent} returns 404
Backend: POST /api/articles/generate-and-publish returns job_id immediately
Backend: GET /api/clients/{id}/combinations returns 8 combinations
Backend: Client has LLM config (DeepSeek provider, deepseek-reasoner model)
Backend: GET /api/articles/{id}/full returns SEO metadata (meta_description, tags, slug, focus_keyword)
Backend: GET /api/llm-providers returns 4 providers (openai, anthropic, deepseek, perplexity)
Frontend: Admin login redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Clients page loads with client table
Frontend: Client actions menu contains 'Genera Articoli' option
Frontend: Navigation to /clients/{clientId}/generate works via actions menu
Frontend: Generator page shows 8 combinations with checkboxes
Frontend: Generator page has WordPress toggle (enabled by default)
Frontend: Generator page shows provider info (DeepSeek)
Frontend: Generator page has Activity Log panel with real-time updates (22 entries)
Frontend: Activity Log page accessible from sidebar
Frontend: Activity Log page shows stats (22 operations, 11 successes, 0 errors, 3 WP published)
Frontend: Activity Log page has client and action filters
Frontend: ConfigurationPage loads with all 6 tabs
Frontend: All 6 ConfigurationPage tabs clickable (API Keys, Knowledge Base, Tono & Stile, Keywords, SERP Analysis, Prompt Avanzato)
Frontend: Article preview modal shows SEO metadata section
Frontend: SEO metadata includes meta_description, focus_keyword, tags, slug
seed_data_creation: Test job from previous run used for job polling test. New job created during generate-and-publish endpoint test (6a336951-c6e9-4cfa-b22d-9c522b91434f)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 4 features working: 1) POST /api/articles/generate-and-publish creates async job and returns job_id immediately, 2) GET /api/jobs/{job_id} polls job status with results and summary, 3) Activity log endpoints GET /api/activity-logs and GET /api/activity-logs/{client_id} return log entries with action types (batch_start, batch_complete, article_generate, wordpress_publish), 4) Generator page at /clients/{clientId}/generate shows 3-column layout (combinations, generation panel, activity log), 5) Activity Log page at /activity shows stats and filterable log list, 6) Article preview modal includes SEO metadata section with meta_description, focus_keyword, tags, slug. Real WordPress publishing verified (WP post IDs 1525-1527).

async_generation.behavior: Returns job_id immediately, runs generation in background task

activity_log.frontend_page: /activity with stats cards and filterable list
